1.text: Good design is as little design as possible.
1.attribution: Dieter Rams, Less and More: The Design Ethos of Dieter Rams

1.text: Design is not just what it looks like and feels like. Design is how it works.

2.text: The greatest deception men suffer is from their own opinions.
We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
It is the mark of an educated mind to be able to entertain a thought without accepting it.
